creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Hello,
 
 I would use @dirrmtry always (for SITE_PERL), because I don't want to
 assume there will no ports put files into it.
 
 On Tue, Dec 15, 2009 at 08:51:00AM +0000, Philip M. Gollucci wrote:
 > Gea-Suan Lin wrote:
 > > Your patch uses @dirrm instead of @dirrmtry. This will cause error when
 > > pkg_delete.
 > Does some other port put files there ?
 > 
 > http://tb.p6m7g8.net//logs/9-CURRENT-amd64-perl/p5-Net-Cassandra-0.34.log
 > 
 > I agree, it was a goof for /Net directories.
 > 
 > >> -@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net/Cassandra
 > >> -@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net
 > >> -@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Net/Cassandra/Backend/Thrift
 > >> -@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Net/Cassandra/Backend
 > >> -@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Net/Cassandra
 > >> -@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Net
 > >> +@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/Net/Cassandra/Backend/Thrift
 > >> +@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/Net/Cassandra/Backend
 > >> +@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/Net/Cassandra
 > >> +@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/Net
 > >> +@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net/Cassandra
 > >> +@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net
 > 
 > 
 > -- 
 > ------------------------------------------------------------------------
 > 1024D/DB9B8C1C B90B FBC3 A3A1 C71A 8E70  3F8C 75B8 8FFB DB9B 8C1C
 > Philip M. Gollucci (pgollucci@p6m7g8.com) c: 703.336.9354
 > VP Apache Infrastructure; Member, Apache Software Foundation
 > Committer,                        FreeBSD Foundation
 > Consultant,                       P6M7G8 Inc.
 > Sr. System Admin,                 Ridecharge Inc.
 > 
 > Work like you don't need the money,
 > love like you'll never get hurt,
 > and dance like nobody's watching.
 
 -- 
 * Gea-Suan Lin  (public key: Using https://keyserver.pgp.com/ to search)
 * If you cannot convince them, confuse them.           -- Harry S Truman
